title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 99.860 - Severability
text:
99.860.  Severability. — If any section, subsection, subdivision, paragraph, sentence or clause of sections 99.800 to 99.860 is, for any reason, held to be invalid or unconstitutional, such decision shall not affect any remaining portion, section, or part thereof which can be given effect without the invalid provision.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1411 & 1587 § 10)
